name: Double Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces semi-sweet chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Combine the crushed wafers and butter. Press the mixture evenly over the bottom and 1 3/4 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
Filling: In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, chocolate, flour, and vanilla until well mixed. Add the eggs one at a time, stirring to combine gently. Do not overmix. Stir in the milk. Pour the filling into the crust. Bake in a 350-degree oven for about 50 minutes or until the center is nearly set when gently shaken. Cool on a wire rack for 5-10 minutes.
Finishing:
Loosen the sides of the cheesecake from the pan. Allow to cool for an additional 30 minutes. Remove the sides of the pan. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for 4-24 hours before serving. Pipe melted vanilla-flavored pieces decoratively on top if desired.
